headline: Dow Jones Index Braces for Volatility Ahead of Earnings Season, CPI, US-Iran Tensions
summary: The Dow Jones Index has braced for volatility as investors wait for the earnings season, US CPI data, and the US-iran tensions

headline: 173-year-old denim giant sees one fashion trend surge 70%
summary: Levi Strauss has spent more than 150 years convincing consumers that jeans belong in almost every wardrobe. Now, its next growth challenge is getting those shoppers to buy much more than denim bottoms. The company is expanding into shirts, sweaters, dresses, shorts, and other lifestyle products ...
